title: Dubliners
author: James Joyce
description: As a delineator of the darkest aspects of Dublin James Joyce is unmatched. For him it has remained in " Dubliners " to illuminate with a flood search of imagination and sympathy extensions entire understanding of middle-class life in the gray city and laughing. Invest with a convincing reality and lasting human significance which are apparently the most trivial and insignificant events. This volume of fifteen short stories and sketches are not insignificant , and almost all are high interpretati...
